# 11 USC 1191 - Subchapter V Plan Confirmation: 1191(a) vs 1191(b) [2026]
> 11 USC 1191 governs Subchapter V small business plan confirmation. 1191(a) consensual vs 1191(b) cramdown - key differences in discharge ti...

## About
section1191.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages

- Section 1191(b) Cramdown - Nonconsensual Subchapter V Plan: https://section1191.org/cramdown.html

- 11 USC 1191 - Subchapter V Plan Confirmation: 1191(a) vs 1191(b): https://section1191.org/
- Subchapter V Plan Content Requirements - Section 1190: https://section1191.org/plan-content.html

- Who Qualifies for Subchapter V?: https://section1191.org/who-qualifies.html
- Privacy Policy: https://section1191.org/privacy.html
